title: [Prompt] Endless GBP Posts
content_md:
# [Prompt] Endless GBP Posts

- Code: f3c18777
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=f3c187770163455c845a157af28d275d
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/a5806965c1aa4b218caae78759c7567f?sid=6a450908-0907-40b4-bcb7-94bf57afd1ae?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 2m 14s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: So similar to the geo taking conversation
This is these GBP posts is something that I have heard other SEOs say they don't do anything and they skip them
You know, but as I said with the geo tagging same philosophy
We're going to create an endless number of GBP posts and it's going to take us a half hour
So anything we can do this quickly that will be done forever once and for all we're just going to go ahead and do it
So we have this prompt it's in the module where we ask where we're going to give chat
GPT all of our services and ask it to write a ton of GBP posts and then it writes all of these GBP posts awesome
Okay, so next assuming you have go high level. We're gonna come into high level and it's in the marketing tab under social planner
We're gonna hit new post
Create new post
We're going to put it on the GBP and then we can come in and we can grab one of them
I'll just grab this one
Put it in there and we're gonna say no button and then we're just going to schedule post
for next week, okay, and then we're gonna
Hit schedule post and then we're gonna do it again and again and again and again
We're just gonna schedule them all so they go out once a week
Forever basically we have 30 to 50 here
So that's almost a year's worth of content if we need more we can say please generate 50 more
right, so
Now we have two years worth of content and what we could actually do if we wanted to is start to recycle them and just put a calendar
Notification in so that we go and delete the old ones when so that we don't have two of the same posts showing up
But I mean look and you know in less than a half hour
I have years worth of GBP posts scheduled out to be in to keep that GBP active and
Engaged we can put images if we want to
The easiest way to do that is of course just to ask chat GPT to generate the images
But you know anything that takes a lot of time will typically skip unless there's clear evidence
It helps these GBP posts super super easy to get years and years and years and
Schedule them out and you're done and you don't have to worry about it again

transcript_text: So similar to the geo taking conversation This is these GBP posts is something that I have heard other SEOs say they don't do anything and they skip them You know, but as I said with the geo tagging same philosophy We're going to create an endless number of GBP posts and it's going to take us a half hour So anything we can do this quickly that will be done forever once and for all we're just going to go ahead and do it So we have this prompt it's in the module where we ask where we're going to give chat GPT all of our services and ask it to write a ton of GBP posts and then it writes all of these GBP posts awesome Okay, so next assuming you have go high level. We're gonna come into high level and it's in the marketing tab under social planner We're gonna hit new post Create new post We're going to put it on the GBP and then we can come in and we can grab one of them I'll just grab this one Put it in there and we're gonna say no button and then we're just going to schedule post for next week, okay, and then we're gonna Hit schedule post and then we're gonna do it again and again and again and again We're just gonna schedule them all so they go out once a week Forever basically we have 30 to 50 here So that's almost a year's worth of content if we need more we can say please generate 50 more right, so Now we have two years worth of content and what we could actually do if we wanted to is start to recycle them and just put a calendar Notification in so that we go and delete the old ones when so that we don't have two of the same posts showing up But I mean look and you know in less than a half hour I have years worth of GBP posts scheduled out to be in to keep that GBP active and Engaged we can put images if we want to The easiest way to do that is of course just to ask chat GPT to generate the images But you know anything that takes a lot of time will typically skip unless there's clear evidence It helps these GBP posts super super easy to get years and years and years and Schedule them out and you're done and you don't have to worry about it again
summary: The lesson explains how to generate a large number of GBP posts using AI tools like ChatGPT and schedule them for regular posting. This strategy ensures continuous engagement on the GBP without requiring constant effort.
key_points: generate multiple GBP posts with AI
